name: Lemon Crisps
recipeInstructions:
1. In a medium bowl, combine flour, baking powder, and salt; set aside.
2. In a large bowl, cream butter, sugar, and lemon peel until light and fluffy.
3. Beat in egg and lemon juice until well mixed (mixture may appear curdled).
4. Stir in the flour mixture until blended.
5. Shape dough into two 2-inch diameter rolls.
6. Wrap tightly; chill for 4 hours or until firm.
7. Using a sharp, thin knife, cut slices 3/16 inch thick using a sawing motion.
8. Add optional decorations if desired.
9. Place slices 1 inch apart on a lightly greased baking sheet.
10. Bake in a preheated oven at 365 degrees for 8-10 minutes or until golden on the bottom.
11. Remove to a rack to cool.
